steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the object of "considered" and refers back to what Damian condemned: "the eating utensils" (also called "table forks"). That antecedent is plural.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree in number with its antecedent. A plural antecedent requires a plural object pronoun.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — them: plural object pronoun agreeing with the plural "eating utensils." ✓
  • Choice B — this: singular demonstrative — violates pronoun-antecedent number agreement with the plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice C — that: singular demonstrative — same number-agreement violation. ✗
  • Choice D — it: singular pronoun — cannot refer to the plural "eating utensils." ✗
That confirms A is correct.
